title: Monorepo scaffold, layered config, MCP server skeleton, CI
selection_reason: deterministic scaffold bead, single domain, user-directed codex implementation with claude supervision
validations: tools/list: 10 tools default, 9 with apply_edits disabled
notes: Supervisor independently re-ran all gates. SDK returns isError:true on schema violations (asserted in tests). gpt-5.5-fast unsupported on this account; used gpt-5.5 medium effort.

title: File catalog, ignore stack, iOS preset, cache substrate, index CLI
selection_reason: single-domain core library bead, codex implements per user direction, claude supervises
validations: rp-mini index . : 40 files/14 dirs in 0.017s, idempotent, valid catalog.json
notes: Supervisor re-ran all gates. iOS preset: .xcodeproj fully ignored, .xcassets kept as single node. Chokidar deferred; lazy grammars moved to bead 4.

title: Nav tools: file_search, read_file, get_file_tree + relevance ranker
selection_reason: multi-module core bead but no contract/security/deploy impact; codex implements per user direction, claude supervises
validations: linked-transport smoke: file_search limit_hit=false, read_file tail -5 returns 5 lines, tree auto=530 tokens < 10k cap
notes: Supervisor re-ran all gates. Watch item for bead 12: rg receives catalog-approved path list (ignore parity) — needs ARG_MAX strategy on very large repos.

title: Codemaps v1: extraction, cache, type index, get_code_structure
selection_reason: core differentiating feature, multi-module but no contract/security/deploy guardrails; codex implements, claude supervises
validations: index cold: 28 computed/26 gated; warm: 28 cached/0 computed
get_code_structure returns getCatalog L77 / buildCatalog L92 / verifyFresh L118
notes: Supervisor re-ran gates + cold/warm cache smoke. Deviation: @vscode/tree-sitter-wasm (tree-sitter-wasms failed web-tree-sitter 0.26 probe). AST traversal instead of compiled .scm queries — structural parity with CE goldens, not byte parity. Bead 9 hardens edge cases.

title: Selection state machine, token delta-accounting, context tools
selection_reason: stateful core of the product; multi-module, no hard guardrails; codex implements, claude supervises
validations: linked-transport: selection ops, auto-codemap deps, stable content_hash, slices_invalidated on content change
notes: Supervisor re-ran gates. Token deltas verified against full-recompute oracle in tests. Bead 6 should build packager on SelectionSnapshot per implementer recommendation.

title: Prompt packager, intent presets, export receipts
selection_reason: output-format bead; multi-module, no hard guardrails; codex implements, claude supervises
validations: golden payload stability, content_hash determinism, preset shaping, intent detection cases
notes: First run of this bead hung at codex session start (57min, 6s CPU, zero output) — killed; relaunch with -c mcp_servers={} fixed it. Operational lesson recorded.

title: apply_edits matching ladder, transactional batches, file_actions
selection_reason: file-mutation correctness bead; high effort run + mandatory supervisor line-by-line review per AGENTS.md escalation
validations: supervisor line-by-line review of matching engine
adversarial matrix: ambiguity fail-closed, batch transactionality, escape fallback, CRLF, indent re-anchor incl. divergent-indent regression added in review
notes: Supervisor review found+fixed divergent-indent flattening (would have broken nested Python replacements); regression test added. Known minor: verbose unified_diff is cosmetic set-diff; catalog invalidation is whole-memo not per-entry; fuzzy selectors with interior blank lines fail closed (no_match) rather than match.

title: Read-only git tool + packager git_diff integration
selection_reason: read-only subprocess wrapper, well-bounded; codex implements, claude supervises
validations: reflog guard: no mutating git ran against this repo
temp-repo matrix: dirty/staged/untracked/renamed, patches truncation, binary flag, blame ranges, review-preset export includes <git_diff>

title: Codemap languages: swift/java/c/cpp/csharp/ruby/php/dart + SwiftUI depth
selection_reason: extension of proven extractor architecture; codex implements, claude supervises
validations: SwiftUI smoke: wrappers + View body + Previews: 2
notes: All 8 grammars available prebuilt (tree-sitter-wasms@0.1.13 + @vscode/tree-sitter-wasm@0.3.1). Known: #Preview macro errors in WASM swift grammar -> source-text fallback for preview counting.

title: Claude Code plugin: context-builder agent, rp-* skills, warm hook
selection_reason: user-facing prompts; codex implements, supervisor performs mandatory fidelity review of discovery contract vs design §4
validations: supervisor fidelity review: all design-§4 contract elements verified present
REVIEW FIX: removed apply_edits/file_actions from builder allowlist+contract+generator — strictly non-mutating

title: Codex plugin: subagent skill, rp-* skills, installer, TOML snippet
selection_reason: packaging bead mirroring proven cc-plugin pattern; codex implements, claude supervises
validations: sync test: codex builder skill == shared contract (no mutating tools)

title: Benchmarks, multi-agent stress gate, release docs
selection_reason: validation bead proving design claims; codex implements, claude independently re-runs stress + bench
tests: pnpm test (vitest: 17 files, 119 tests passed incl. stress)
validations: stress: 4 concurrent real stdio sessions < 2.5x single baseline, cache integrity
bench verified: supervisor re-ran script on second corpus; corpus numbers committed in docs/bench.md
notes: Finding: broad content queries can exceed execFile maxBuffer before response shaping — post-MVP: stream rg output. Codemap cold warm is the slow path (32 files/sec WASM); warm path 356ms.

title: Investigation route benchmark: rp-mini vs RepoPrompt vs shell
agent_selected: primary Codex orchestrator plus three shell-capable Codex explore subagents
selection_reason: read-only benchmark/report task benefited from parallel isolated investigations with route-specific constraints and comparable wall-clock receipts
fallback_agent: manual shell plus RepoPrompt MCP verification
validations: benchmark document synthesized timings and quality findings
CE .rp-mini cache side effect recorded and left untouched
notes: Results: shell fastest total wall clock at 155s; normal RepoPrompt best guided synthesis at 638s total with 447.7137s context_builder; rp-mini showed 45.54s cold CE index and 0.66s warm index but active Codex could not hot-load the newly installed slash workflow.

title: Shell CLI help/wrappers and executable Codex installer
selection_reason: CLI/user setup behavior change needed focused implementation plus full validation; no separate subagent needed
validations: targeted CLI test passed: --help, search/read/tree/structure/tool wrappers, persisted selection/context
Codex plugin test verifies install.sh executable and direct install/uninstall
live CLI smoke: --help, search, tool file_search
CE checkout cache cleared by moving .rp-mini to /tmp/rp-mini-ce-cache-cleared-20260610-073526
notes: CLI wrappers reuse the shared server tool dispatcher via runRpMiniTool, keeping shell and MCP behavior aligned. Generic tool wrapper exposes all current MCP tools without requiring a host MCP client.
